scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (contacts, jobs, tasks, activities, files); JobNimbus's write endpoints (contact/job create/update, task completion, estimate/invoice CRUD) are out of scope for this wave (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented contact creation; not implemented in this bundle
legacy connector never implemented job creation; not implemented in this bundle
estimates not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
invoices not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
